 {"id":"frankenredis-jvdd","title":"Add live Redis CLIENT NO-TOUCH and OBJECT IDLETIME differential coverage","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-17T10:10:45.576336385Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-17T10:12:35.170250169Z","closed_at":"2026-04-17T10:12:35.168516294Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenredis-jzs","title":"Centralize version string as single const across all crates","description":"## Problem

The Redis version string appears in multiple locations:
- fr-command/src/lib.rs: \"redis_version:7.2.0-frankenredis\" (INFO)
- fr-runtime/src/lib.rs: hello_bulk(\"7.2.0\") (HELLO response)
- fr-runtime/src/lib.rs: (\"redis-ver\", \"7.2.0\") (RDB aux field — was 7.0.0, fixed to 7.2.0 in f8c5a8a)

While these are now consistent (all 7.2.0), there's no single source of truth. If the version needs to change, all three locations must be found and updated.

## Fix

1. Define a const in fr-runtime (or a shared crate): pub const REDIS_COMPAT_VERSION: &str = \"7.2.0\";
2. Use this const in all locations
3. Consider also deriving the FrankenRedis version from Cargo.toml via env!(\"CARGO_PKG_VERSION\")

## Files to Modify

- crates/fr-runtime/src/lib.rs: Define const, use in RDB and HELLO
- crates/fr-command/src/lib.rs: Use const in INFO","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-25T03:11:03.925020086Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-25T03:34:50.855981956Z","closed_at":"2026-03-25T03:34:50.854614367Z","close_reason":"Centralized REDIS_COMPAT_VERSION const in fr-store, used by fr-command INFO and fr-runtime HELLO/RDB","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenredis-k14a","title":"redis parity: SET expiry option exclusivity","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"codex-frankenredis","created_at":"2026-04-20T15:25:56.584538978Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-20T15:35:48.984121227Z","closed_at":"2026-04-20T15:35:48.982245184Z","close_reason":"Superseded after inspection showed SET expiry option exclusivity already matched Redis","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
-{"id":"frankenredis-k2lp","title":"s5su part a: document upstream RDB stream on-disk layout (fr-persist reference)","description":"Preparation sub-bead for br-frankenredis-s5su. Extract the upstream RDB_TYPE_STREAM_LISTPACKS (15), _LISTPACKS_2 (19), and _LISTPACKS_3 (21) on-disk layouts from legacy_redis_code/redis/src/rdb.c + t_stream.c and write them up as a reference doc at crates/fr-persist/docs/rdb-stream-format.md.

Scope:
  * Radix tree layout: (stream-id, listpack) pair count + per-pair listpack blob encoding.
  * Stream metadata fields: length, last_id, first_id, max_deleted_id, entries_added.
  * Per-group PEL layout: group-name length + name + last-delivered id + pel count + consumer slot.
  * Per-consumer fields: name + seen_time (v2+) + active_time (v3+) + per-consumer PEL ids.
  * Field-by-field u64/u32/length-encoded type list so the encoder sub-bead (s5su-d) can be written from this doc alone.

No code changes.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-24T00:17:24.003737528Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-24T00:17:24.003737528Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

Extract the upstream RDB_TYPE_STREAM_LISTPACKS (15), _LISTPACKS_2 (19), and _LISTPACKS_3 (21) on-disk layouts from legacy_redis_code/redis/src/rdb.c + t_stream.c and write them up as a reference doc at crates/fr-persist/docs/rdb-stream-format.md.

Scope:
  * Radix tree layout: (stream-id, listpack) pair count + per-pair listpack blob encoding.
  * Stream metadata fields: length, last_id, first_id, max_deleted_id, entries_added.
  * Per-group PEL layout: group-name length + name + last-delivered id + pel count + consumer slot.
  * Per-consumer fields: name + seen_time (v2+) + active_time (v3+) + per-consumer PEL ids.
  * Field-by-field u64/u32/length-encoded type list so the encoder sub-bead (s5su-d) can be written from this doc alone.

No code changes.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-24T00:17:24.003737528Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-24T06:45:54.519915427Z","closed_at":"2026-04-24T06:45:54.517996194Z","close_reason":"Already completed on main in f6e566e: crates/fr-persist/docs/rdb-stream-format.md documents upstream RDB stream type 15/19/21 layout, metadata, PEL, consumer timing, and decoder checklist; verified with focused fr-persist rdb_stream tests","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

 {"id":"frankenredis-k57e","title":"redis parity: ACL LOG should record channel denials with reason=channel and the channel name","description":"Upstream redis/tests/unit/acl.tcl checks that a denied PUBLISH records ACL LOG reason=channel and object=<channel>. Local fr-runtime ACL logging only distinguishes command and key denials in the admission gate, so channel ACL failures do not surface with Redis-compatible log metadata. Extend ACL logging to capture channel violations and the denied channel name.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T09:53:33.086074973Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-21T10:53:26.326493928Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T10:53:26.324388510Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
